provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Standards (Declaration of Standards) Notice, 2023 and shall come into effect sixty days after publication.

provisions.title: Declaration of Compulsory Standards
provisions.content: The Standards specified in the Schedule to this Notice are hereby declared to be Compulsory Standards for each commodity or for the manufacturing, production, processing or treatment of each commodity specified thereunder.

provisions.title: Declaration of National Standards
